name: @mbai460/photoapp-server
description: Shared service core for MBAi 460 PhotoApp surfaces — extracted from Project 01 Part 03 server tree (Phase 0.2 mechanically pure + Phase 0.3 CL9 SQL-into-repositories bounded reconciliation). Internals-only: exports services / repositories / middleware (factories) / schemas; never routers (consumers own routing because their wire contracts differ).
